videos.headline: UNC's INT sets up Devontez Walker's 3rd receiving TD
videos.description: UNC's Cedric Gray picks off Tyler Van Dyke, then Drake Maye finds Devontez Walker for their third pitch-and-catch touchdown.

videos.description: Devontez Walker snags the dart from Drake Maye to put the UNC on the board first.
